_description: Script templates for different ad lengths and platforms. Fill in with brand/product specifics and hook type.

3s_hook_only.name: 3-Second Hook (scroll stopper)
3s_hook_only.purpose: Stop the scroll. Create curiosity gap. Make them watch the next 10 seconds

second_0_1.name: THE FREEZE
second_0_1.description: The attention-grabbing moment. An expression, a visual, something that breaks pattern
second_0_1.text_overlay: [FILL: optional hook text. Short. 5-8 words max]

second_1_3.name: THE SHIFT
second_1_3.description: Expression evolves. Viewer is curious about what happened. Incomplete story creates gap

15s_full_ad.name: 15-Second Full Ad
15s_full_ad.purpose: Complete ad with hook, body, and CTA. Most common format for UGC ads

second_0_3.name: HOOK
second_0_3.description: Scroll stopper. Reaction, shocking statement, or pattern interrupt
second_0_3.audio: Natural ambient + optional subtle sound effect

second_3_8.name: BODY / PROOF
second_3_8.description: Show the product, explain the why, provide proof. This is where the story lives
second_3_8.text_overlay: [FILL: key claims, social proof, or story continuation]
second_3_8.audio: Voiceover or text-on-screen. Music subtle if present

second_8_12.name: RESULT / TRANSFORMATION
second_8_12.description: The payoff. How the product delivers. Before/after, feeling description, or demonstration
second_8_12.audio: Continue VO or let visuals carry

second_12_15.name: CTA
second_12_15.description: Clear call to action. What should they do? Where should they go?
second_12_15.text_overlay: [FILL: CTA text. 'Link in bio', 'Use code X', 'Try it for $2/day']
second_12_15.audio: Clear VO CTA or text only

30s_storytelling.name: 30-Second Story Ad
30s_storytelling.purpose: Longer format for storytelling. Problem-solution arc or detailed testimonial

second_0_3.name: HOOK
second_0_3.description: Same as 15s hook. Must stop scroll immediately

second_3_10.name: PROBLEM / SETUP
second_3_10.description: Establish the pain point or context. Why should they care?

second_10_18.name: SOLUTION / PRODUCT
second_10_18.description: Introduce the product. Show it in use. Explain key benefits

second_18_25.name: PROOF / RESULTS
second_18_25.description: Social proof, before/after, personal experience, data

script_writing_rules: Hook must work WITHOUT audio (most people scroll with sound off)
Text overlays do the heavy lifting for first 3 seconds
One claim per beat. Don't stack multiple messages
CTA must be specific: not 'check it out' but 'Link in bio, code GLOW for 20% off'
Every beat should make sense as a standalone screenshot (for static ad variants)
Write the text overlays FIRST, then design the visuals around them
